scripts.build: vite build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const src='dist/assets'; const dst='dist'; fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,'remoteEntry.js'),path.join(dst,'remoteEntry.js')); for (const f of fs.readdirSync(src)) { if (f.startsWith('__federation_') || f.startsWith('index-') || f.endsWith('.css')) { fs.copyFileSync(path.join(src,f),path.join(dst,f)); } } console.log('Copied federation assets from dist/assets to dist root');"
